channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Six luxury watches that could appreciate in value over time
item.description: Wearing a high-end watch is often seen as a mark of sophistication and, if chosen wisely, can also be a sound financial investment. While Rolex is typically the first choice for collectors, experts hi...

item.title: Abhishek Banerjee Challenges BJP as Falta Assembly Constituency Faces Repolling
item.description: Trinamool Congress MP Abhishek Banerjee has strongly reacted to the announcement of fresh polling in the Falta assembly constituency in West Bengal after reports of serious electoral offences during t...

item.title: Academy Rules Out AI Actors and Writers from Oscar Consideration
item.description: The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences has clarified that actors and writers generated by artificial intelligence will not be eligible for Oscars, reinforcing the importance of human contribu...

item.title: Exploring Cultural Stereotypes, AI Safety, and a UFO Encounter
item.description: In a fascinating compilation, The Guardian presents six compelling stories from the past week that span diverse subjects. First, Rebecca Liu dives into the overexposure and underdevelopment of the ‘pu...

item.title: Abortion Pill Manufacturers Appeal to Supreme Court Over Mail-Order Access
item.description: Two pharmaceutical companies, Danco Laboratories and GenBioPro, have petitioned the U.S. Supreme Court to reinstate mail-order access to mifepristone, an abortion pill that is used in about two-thirds...

item.title: Film explores 40-year anniversary of Turfloop campus military occupation
item.description: Award-winning director Tebogo Malope returns to Turfloop campus in Mankweng to create 'Studying Under the Barrel of a Gun', a psychological thriller with musical elements that revisits the student upr...

item.title: Jincy Roese scores in overtime as Minnesota Frost win Game 1 against Montreal Victoire
item.description: In an intense opening match of the Professional Women’s Hockey League semi-finals, Jincy Roese scored 4:30 into overtime to secure a 5-4 victory for the Minnesota Frost over the Montreal Victoire. The...

item.title: Trump reviews Iranian peace proposal amid ongoing tensions over nuclear programme and strait control
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump stated that he would review a new 14-point peace proposal from Iran but expressed scepticism about its acceptance, asserting that Iran had not 'paid a big enough price...

item.title: US and Zambia face delays in $1 billion health aid agreement
item.description: The United States has expressed disappointment with Zambia over delays in finalising a major health aid deal worth over $1 billion. According to outgoing US ambassador Michael Gonzales, repeated attem...

item.title: Pakistan Hockey Eyes LA2028 Olympic Qualification, Prepares for World Cup and Asian Games
item.description: Karachi: Pakistan hockey is at an important juncture in 2026 after enduring years of difficulties both on and off the field. The national team, after eight years, has returned to the World Cup by reac...

item.title: US reviews Iran peace proposal while accelerating major arms sales and regional tensions rise
item.description: The United States and Iran appear to be navigating a fragile and uncertain diplomatic moment as tensions remain high across the Middle East. President Donald Trump said he will review a newly submitte...

item.title: Court decisions in Mugabe Jr case raise concerns over fairness and influence of wealth
item.description: The recent court outcome involving Bellarmine Chatunga Mugabe and his cousin Tobias Matonhodze has sparked public outrage over perceived preferential treatment for the wealthy. Chatunga allegedly poin...

item.title: 5 common infections that can slowly damage your organs and how to spot the early signs
item.description: This article explains how some infections can quietly harm major organs like the kidneys, liver, stomach, sinuses, and gums without giving strong warning signs at first. Urinary tract infections (UTIs...

item.title: Tucker Carlson Denies Claiming Trump Could Be the ‘Antichrist’ Amid Controversial Remarks
item.description: Conservative podcaster Tucker Carlson has strongly denied making a statement that questioned whether former President Donald Trump could be the ‘Antichrist,’ a comment attributed to him last month on ...

item.title: Philadelphia 76ers defeat Boston Celtics in Game 7 to complete historic series comeback
item.description: The Philadelphia 76ers completed a remarkable comeback by defeating the Boston Celtics 109-100 in Game 7 on the road, advancing to the Eastern Conference semifinals. Overcoming a 3-1 series deficit, t...

item.title: Weekly Entertainment Highlights: Films, Theatre, Music, and More
item.description: This week’s entertainment roundup covers a wide spectrum of cultural events across cinema, stage, music, art, and streaming. Cinema enthusiasts can anticipate the highly awaited sequel, The Devil Wear...

item.title: Scientists Observe Ultrafast Formation of Star-Like Plasma in Copper Atoms
item.description: Researchers at Helmholtz-Zentrum Dresden-Rossendorf have achieved a breakthrough in observing the ultrafast dynamics of plasma formation using a combination of advanced laser systems. By targeting a t...

item.title: Arsenal’s Dominant Performance Takes Them Six Points Clear of Manchester City
item.description: Arsenal put on a commanding performance to defeat Fulham 3-0, extending their lead at the top of the Premier League. The victory, which came after a dazzling first-half display, sees the Gunners go si...

item.title: NT man charged with murder and sexual assault of young Warlpiri girl
item.description: Northern Territory police have formally charged 47-year-old Jefferson Lewis with murder and two counts of sexual assault following the death of five-year-old Warlpiri girl Kumanjayi Little Baby. The y...

item.title: Animal Advocates Condemn Puppy Cruelty in Legazpi
item.description: Animal advocates have expressed outrage over an incident of cruelty towards a puppy in Legazpi City, which has sparked public condemnation. The incident, which was captured in a video circulating onli...
